title: Communicator
description:
We're refreshing this badge and we'd love more Scout Troops to be involved. Interested? Drop us an email at programme@scouts.org.uk 

Communication can help us reach out to more people, from longer distances and using a wide range of languages. Work towards your Communicator badge and help bring people closer together.

tips.title: Guidance for Leaders
tips.details: - Getting involved in Jamboree on the Air (JOTA) or Jamboree on the Internet (JOTI) provides a good opportunity for Scouts to work towards this badge. For more information, please visit the [WOSM event page](https://www.jotajoti.info/) or the [UK JOTA-JOTI Facebook page](https://www.facebook.com/pages/Jota-Joti-UK/117666688369069), or email [joti@scouts.org.uk.](mailto:joti@scouts.org.uk)

tips.title: Get involved in updating this badge
tips.details:
We're currently reviewing and will be updating this badge, as it's a little out of date. We'd love more Troops and volunteers to get involved.

If you're interested, email [programme@scouts.org.uk](mailto:programme@scouts.org.uk?subject=Scout Communicator badge review) and we'll send you all the info you need.
